session_context.delta_vs_09_30_tick: First live Day-3 mark landed (09:31:22). Book is POSITIVE at +0.206% (+₹2,062.30) against a bearish premarket forecast (GIFT Nifty -0.79%). MAHABANK extended to -5.98% (2 paise above -6% fire line). AUBANK pushed to +1.89% while strategy remains silent — the 'oversize+gain+unacted' triangle is now tripwire-hot. No trades. No open orders. Overrides unchanged.

pnl_detail.note: Book is positive at the first Day-3 mark despite bearish macro forecast. Offsetting strength: AUBANK +1.89%, TORNTPOWER +3.64%, PNBHOUSING +2.08%, GRANULES +1.89%, NESTLEIND +0.92%. MAHABANK -5.98% and ADANIPOWER -1.08% are the single-name drags but the book-level net is clearly green.

At -5.98%, 2 paise (0.02 INR) above the ₹76.61 / -6.00% second-knob fire line. NOT a clean breach per discipline (see Day-2 14:18 precedent: 'at the threshold, not beyond = no fire'). ARMED.

grandfathered fills; cap binds only against NEW admissions.

trigger_a_book_below_neg_1_pct.reason: Book is POSITIVE at +0.206%. ~₹32,122 buffer to the -3% daily loss gate; ~₹12,082 buffer to the -1% findings trigger. Macro-bearish forecast did not translate to book weakness because of the AUBANK/TORNTPOWER/PNBHOUSING offset cluster.

trigger_g_power_above_0_20_of_capital.note: Marginally wider buffer than EOD (3.80 → 3.98). TORNTPOWER lift offset by NTPC/ADANIPOWER mild drag.

trigger_e_mahabank_below_neg_6_pct.status: NEAR MISS: last_price ₹76.63, fire line ₹76.61, differential 2 paise. PER DISCIPLINE RULE (Day-2 14:18 precedent): 'at the threshold, not beyond = no fire; wait for a confirmed further extension before stacking.' ARMED. Any tick showing last_price ≤ 76.61 fires: min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01.

trigger_f_strategy_silence_past_1st_hour.note: Non-numeric trigger. Cumulative silence 43h45m. 15 min to the 10:15 first-hour threshold. If still zero activity at 10:15, escalate to strategy_reviewer for same-day intervention consideration rather than EOD.

trigger_meta_high_composite.note: 1-of-3 missing (book is +0.206%, not below -0.5%). Silence + MAHABANK watch are 2-of-3 and have held at 2-of-3 since Day-2 14:00. Without the negative-book leg, HIGH elevation is not justified.

findings: Day-3 T+45m. First intraday snapshot (09:31:22) resolves the data-availability gap from the 09:00/09:30 ticks. Book is POSITIVE at +0.206% (+₹2,062.30) against a bearish premarket forecast — the AUBANK/TORNTPOWER/PNBHOUSING/GRANULES/NESTLEIND offset cluster is meaningfully stronger than the MAHABANK/ADANIPOWER single-name drags.

MAHABANK at -5.98% is 2 paise (₹0.02) above the -6% / ₹76.61 fire line. This is a NEAR-MISS not a breach. Per the Day-2 14:18 discipline precedent ('at the threshold, not beyond = no fire; wait for a confirmed further extension'), the second-knob stacking (min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01) is NOT fired this tick but remains ARMED for any subsequent tick with last_price ≤ 76.61.

AUBANK triangle is NOW HOT: 18.78% of capital (grandfathered over the 0.15 cap, +3.78 pp over, widening from +3.58 pp EOD) + unrealized +1.89% (above the +1% flag threshold) + strategy silent for 43h45m. All three legs of the 'oversize+gain+unacted' flag are fired. This is the strongest case yet for strategy_reviewer intervention ahead of schedule — a large winning position being passively carried is the mirror-image of a large losing position being passively carried (MAHABANK), and both point at the same strategy-layer failure mode.

Strategy-layer silence clock is at 43h45m cumulative and 45 min into Day-3 trading. Non-numeric first-hour trigger (10:15 IST) fires in 15 min. The firing condition has not yet been met, but the probability of meeting it is high given zero observed activity across two prior ticks (09:00, 09:30) and the prior 43h+ stretch.

BFSI cluster at 35.97% (vs 35.91% EOD): +6 bps, effectively flat. Buffer to the 37% d-trigger narrowed 1.09 → 1.03 pp. AUBANK's +1.89% strength is the swing factor — if AUBANK extends another 1 pp+ and the other members hold, BFSI could cross 37% via pure mark-to-market (no new admission required).
Power cluster at 16.02% (vs 16.20% EOD): -18 bps. Buffer to the 20% g-trigger marginally wider at 3.98 pp. TORNTPOWER's +3.64% lift partially absorbed by NTPC -0.51% and ADANIPOWER -1.08%.

Deployment at 78.60% (vs 78.57% EOD): +3 bps of mark-to-market drift. Still 8.60 pp over the 0.70 override cap (grandfathered). Zero admission surface for NEW entries until a SELL frees cash — the deployed cap remains the primary structural block.

Five of ten holdings are in the green, five in the red. Counting by magnitude the book is +₹2,062.30 net. This is the first positive Day-3 reading and confirms the pre-market bearish macro forecast under-estimated the book's sector-mix offset.

Override posture (0.60 / 0.15 / 0.70 / 0.015 / 0.04) continues to be structurally appropriate. No lever is obsolete; no lever is over-tightened for the current exposure profile. The existing knobs are doing their job — keeping the admission surface closed — and the action vector is now firmly on the strategy layer (SELL / MODIFY / EXIT) not the risk layer (further tightening).

Risk_level stays MEDIUM. The HIGH composite meta-trigger fails cleanly on the book-negative leg (book is +0.206%, not below -0.5%). Silence + MAHABANK watch are 2-of-3 and have held at 2-of-3 since Day-2 14:00.
actions_taken: No numeric override changes this tick. Holding min_confidence=0.60, max_position_pct=0.15, max_deployed_pct=0.70, default_sl_pct=0.015, max_sl_pct=0.04.

Discipline rationale: the spec-hard MAHABANK -6% second-knob trigger is NEAR MISS (-5.98% vs -6.00%, 2-paise gap). Per the Day-2 14:18 precedent, firing a lever at the threshold rather than beyond it would break the override-posture discipline. No other numeric trigger has fired this tick (book positive, BFSI flat, Power flat, no new admissions). Firing without a clean trigger would be decorative.

FIRED a non-numeric flag: AUBANK 'oversize+gain+unacted' triangle. All three legs confirmed (18.78% of capital / +1.89% unrealized / 43h45m silence). This is the strongest case to date for strategy_reviewer intervention ahead of the scheduled EOD review. Recommend the strategy_reviewer tick treat this as a same-day escalation input rather than an EOD-only observation.

Arming MAHABANK -6% second-knob for the very next intraday tick: any snapshot with MAHABANK last_price ≤ 76.61 (or pnl_pct ≤ -6.00%) fires: min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01. This is a 2-paise gap; the fire probability on the 10:30 tick is materially non-trivial given the trajectory slope (from -5.14% EOD to -5.98% at T+15m post-open).

Maintaining risk_level at MEDIUM. Composite HIGH meta-trigger (silence + MAHABANK watch + book-negative) fails on the book-negative leg (+0.206%). Elevating without the third leg would break the composite discipline established at Day-2 14:00.
actions_not_taken: Did NOT fire min_sl_pct 0.005 → 0.01 on MAHABANK. Reason: -5.98% is NOT below -6.00%. Precedent (Day-2 14:18): 'at the threshold, not beyond = no fire; wait for a confirmed further extension.' ARMED for next tick.

Did NOT tighten daily_loss_limit_pct (0.03 → 0.025). Reason: trigger (a) not fired — book is POSITIVE at +0.206%. ~₹12K buffer to the -1% findings trigger and ~₹32K buffer to the -3% loss gate. Tightening a loss gate on a positive book is pure theater.

Did NOT raise min_confidence (0.60 → 0.65). Reason: trigger (d) not fired — BFSI 35.97%, 1.03 pp buffer. Also: zero admission surface exists given the 0.70 deployed cap binding at 8.60 pp. A stricter confidence gate has no admission surface to bite on.
Did NOT tighten max_deployed_pct (0.70 → 0.68). Reason: 8.60 pp binding gap is already maximum SELL-before-BUY friction. Further tightening without an active SELL is decorative.

Did NOT tighten max_position_pct (0.15 → 0.12). Reason: AUBANK 18.78% is grandfathered drift; a tighter cap cannot retract. The cap is already binding against any new entry anyway (no admission surface).

Did NOT tighten max_sl_pct (0.04 → 0.03). Reason: no new admission has occurred since the Day-2 16:00 lever was set; the 0.04 ceiling has not been tested by a new entry. Tightening an untested cap is speculative.

Did NOT elevate risk_level to HIGH. Reason: composite meta-trigger fails on the book-negative leg (+0.206%). Silence + MAHABANK watch alone have been 2-of-3 for multiple ticks — elevating now would be a moving goalpost.

Did NOT escalate strategy_silence to strategy_reviewer this tick. Reason: the 10:15 first-hour threshold has not yet been met (15 min to go). Escalating now would front-run the spec-defined threshold. Will fire cleanly at 10:15 if silence persists, with the AUBANK triangle flag attached as an amplifying signal.

(b) Strategy layer executes FIRST SELL/EXIT since 2026-04-22 14:13 → read justification. Relax max_deployed_pct 0.70 → 0.72 (one-way, non-cumulative, never above 0.75). Any new admission on freed cash must pass cluster discipline (no 4th BFSI, no 4th Power without explicit justification).
(g) Power cluster above 0.20 of capital via mark OR new admission → findings flag, no numeric lever. Currently 16.02%, 3.98 pp buffer.
(IndusInd event) IndusInd Q4 print at 5:00 PM IST. If miss → likely negative BFSI spill to AUBANK/PNBHOUSING → trigger (d) fire-probability rises for 16:00/EOD tick.

(meta-ARMED) If any tick shows ALL of: (i) strategy STILL silent, (ii) book below -0.5%, (iii) MAHABANK below -5.5% → ELEVATE risk_level to HIGH AND recommend strategy_reviewer same-day intervention. Currently 2-of-3 (component ii is the blocking leg at +0.206%).
